text:
Hello,

My applogies, I did not provide you with the results for the mentioned Lenovo Thinkpad SL510. It is booting normally, though with the following error message present on the screen:

error 1 lba 753665307
failed to clear pad2 area of primary vdev
failed to read pad2 area of primary vdev

That's it.

Thanks.
